mnemonics: CHARS EXTRACT: Characters Held, Accessed, Read & Transformed - Every eXam Tests Recall And Traversal Skills
keyPoints: The String class provides methods like charAt() and getChars() for extracting single characters or a range of characters.
Character arrays can be created from strings using toCharArray() for more detailed manipulation.
The StringReader class allows for stream-based character-by-character reading from a string, treating it as an input stream.
commonMistakes: Forgetting that string indices are zero-based, leading to off-by-one errors when using charAt(index).
Not handling StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when trying to access a character beyond the string's length.
Confusing character extraction with byte extraction, especially when dealing with encoding and Unicode characters.
